entry.title: Re: SAP Learning Hub Adoption Sessions - New webinars starting 29 May 2025
entry.content:
Thank you for all the great suggestions so far @F_M and @arymak87. I will consider these for future sessions 🙂 
@Andreas__S  yes, the sessions will be recorded and added to this blog page, so please subscribe to the page to receive updates when recordings are posted and also of upcoming sessions.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Compatibility Packs
entry.content:
Dear Betty,
Could you please clarify whether this means that a customer using SAP HCM under CP on SAP S/4HANA can migrate to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and continue using classic SAP HCM until 31/12/2030 under CP?

Thanks in advance,
Moisés

entry.title: I need to read content of the files in BPC UJFS in abap program .
entry.content: I need to read content of the files in BPC UJFS in abap program . Class cl_ujf_file_service_mgr  looks promising , Can someone share a sample code using this class for reading data from UJFS file into internal table?

entry.title: Re: Asset Accounting Overview - avaiable cards
entry.content: Different system / component versions could be a reason. Can you double check S/4HANA version as well as component  UIAPFI70 release version + SPS?

entry.title: Re: Infoporter Job Info - Hire date = FTSD
entry.content: Try coping the hiring record changing the event reason to the recruitment reason with an earlier date.  Insert that record into your Excel CSV file above the hiring record.

entry.title: Re: How to implement hierarchical filtering in TreeTable in SAPUI5?
entry.content: I recommend sharing the filter logic in your controller and in the back end as well if it makes sense.

entry.title: Re: Related For loop Iteration
entry.content:
If you just need to count from 1. Then simplest solution is to use INDEX INTO addition of FOR expression:

lt_final = VALUE #( FOR ls_test IN lt_test
                    INDEX INTO temp_index
                     ( number = temp_index
                       name   = ls_test-name  ) ).

entry.title: How to enhance standart screen of migo?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
Is it possible to enhance a standart screen at migo ('Serial Numbers tab')?
Could i add some buttons inside red rectangle as example?

entry.title: How to make customer taxable or non taxable based on the if customer is reselling or using?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have requirement to use US client as taxable or not based if customer is reselling it should be non taxable and if customer is using it then i will be taxable. We are using vertex system to calculate taxes in S4 public cloud system. Vertex suggested to use usage flag as taxable or not but we are not sending it to vertex via CPI as we are using standard workflow. 

Please advise how to resolve this issue or we have any alternative solution to use customer as taxable or not

entry.title: DCD is nothing
entry.content: In my S/4 system, in tcodes VKM* and table UKM_DCD_ATTR and fiori app “Manage Documented Credit Decisionscan” all can show the blocked SO，but in tcode UKM_MY_DCD is nothing. I want UKM_MY_DCD to show the blocked SO. How to do it? Who can teach me? More information in the attached image. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: How to implement hierarchical filtering in TreeTable in SAPUI5?
entry.content: I think part of your problem is going to tie to how the table manages the binding contexts - I think you will find that there are only the binding contexts for 10 or 20 rows... whatever the visible count is defined as in the application. I became aware of it when correcting some code affecting scrolling that was delivered by some consultants.

entry.title: Re: Ariba CIG : Split Text
entry.content:
Hi,

to get rid of the other interfere, could you please remove the rule 'repeat node' and try again?

Best regards,

Sirui

entry.title: Re: Extend Standard Purchase order API with custom Fields
entry.content: This kind of posts should not be allowed this is useless spam, no business context provided irrelevant steps just another useless document.

entry.title: Re: SAP EAM
entry.content:
Hello yathiraj,

can you please explain the scenario because mostly after performing the confirmation the system will make the fields as greyed out and no further changes can be made only the settlement rule can be changed , whereas if you want to perform or make changes in the order level then you need to cancel the confirmation.

so can you please explain what is the error that you are facing .

Regards,

Neeraj.

entry.title: Re: CIAP@TDF: Baixa de fichas

entry.title: Re: Accessing SAP Datasphere from ABAP System (S/4HANA OP)
entry.content:
Hi Ryan-Crosby,

Thanks for the response.

I could not really grasp your answer fully. The Fiori app is supplied with data from a backend ABAP system. It is not that the Fiori app is directly requiring to read from SAP Datasphere. Can the backend ABAP system act as client? If yes, what are the configurations or installations to be done in the ABAP system?

Regards,

Madhura Lobo

entry.title: Calculo SDI con absentismos bimestre anterior- “HCM Payroll Mexico“
entry.content:
Buen día para todos!!,

Disculpen la molestia pero quiero hacerles una consulta sobre un calculo de SDI que he revisado y no encuentro el tema. Les platico el escenario con un empleado quincenal:

El empleado tiene su SDI calculado el 01.03.2025, este ya con la variable de marzo- abril los días del bimestre fueron completo los 59 días.

Se calcula la nomina del 01.03.2025 al 15.03.2025 sin ninguna novedad y para la nómina del 16.03.2025 al 31.03.2025 se registran faltas injustificadas de los días 25 y 26 de febrero porque el empleado no pudo comprobar el ausentismo. 

El resto de las nóminas de abril pasan normales y cuando se calcula el SDI al 01.05.2025, se espera que el cálculo de la variable considere los dos absentismos registrados; y lo calcule, no sobre 61 días, si no sobre 59 considerando la disminución de la faltas, pero no lo está haciendo.

¿Me podrían orientar en si me falta alguna nota o algo, ya estuve revisando y no le encuentro?

Gracias de antemano por su apoyo y excelente día.

Saludos.

entry.title: How to call static action in controller
entry.content:
I have implemented a static action in bdef using RAP.

This action contains deep input parameter.

In the fiori custom controller, I am trying to call the action using "invokeaction".

I want to pass parameters of extracted data from an csv.

But since action is bound, it requires a context. I tried ways to create a context but the invoke action always give me these errors:

  •  EditFlow.invokeAction:Error: Pass a context for a bound action
  • Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'getMetaPath')

need your advice on how to call an action while passing a deep parameter.

is there way to make the action entity-unbound?

Note: service binding I use is V4 UI.

entry.content:
Hello,
I’m building a custom report similar to ME2N to display PO data.
I can get the PO quantity from EKPO, but I’m not sure how to correctly calculate:

Delivered quantity

Invoiced quantity

entry.title: SAP SAC Story Total Sum calculation issues
entry.content:
Hi  Can some one suggest ,

 Total Sum calculation issue at bottom of the Report.

we have 4 Tabs  in each Tab has its Input control filter static cost center and  date  

when i select date  induvial for month 2025 January, Feb , March record rows as 

2025 Jan  Row count is 181

2025 Feb  Row count is 182

2025 Mar Row count is 183

 

when i apply formula as below 

 

when i select specic month  Jan or Mar, we see  New Total at Row  Sum 181 and 183 

 

Since we have Hier Applied GL_master FSV and snow leaf node option enabled . we are not able to select Total option

 

Actual we Need to See Single Total Sum  at bottom of the Report when we select diff Months

entry.title: Re: Accessing SAP Datasphere from ABAP System (S/4HANA OP)
entry.content: For the Fiori app to access Datasphere the specified client would need to be running and accessible on the ABAP backend, otherwise you would need a separate web server running the client that would be available as a destination for the Fiori app.  Certainly wouldn't recommend installing the ODBC client on the platform that is running the SAP environment.

entry.title: Re: DCD is nothing
entry.content: Fiori transaction UKM_MY_DCDS has been replaced by F5587

entry.title: Re: CALL TRANSFORMATION - Existence check condition on XML elements
entry.content:
Thanks for the feedback, but alas nobody would open all your images one image at a time (click-wait 3 seconds-close four times). Except me... Instead, you can paste code or paste images (Ctrl+V). In short, you have used <tt:s-cond> (s for serialization) instead of <tt:cond> or <tt:d-cond>. For serialization, you might use CALL TRANSFORMATION ... OPTIONS initial_components = 'suppress' to avoid all <tt:s-cond check="not-initial(...)"> (assuming that the initial values are optional in the receiving application).

Input XML:

Original transformation ("does not work"):

Debug:

Fixed transformation ("works"):

Martin Pösinger, ADP

entry.title: May I get .rpt file samples for payment advice?
Re: inventory in warehouse report
entry.content: Hello Sir,

entry.title: Learn how SAP is enhancing performance of SAP Analytics Cloud for QRC2.2025 for Planning
entry.content:
The purpose of this blog post series is to highlight some of the functional and technical improvements SAP is making to enhance performance of SAP Analytics Cloud that may not be immediately noticeable to our customers and partner community. The goal of this blog post is to provide more transparency around these enhancements to provide some guidance when these enhancements are triggered and any special setup that is required.  Where the feature is broad in scope or requires extensive configuration, like the planning area, we will also release a separate blog post with more details.

For the QRC2.2025 release, we would like to highlight these planning related performance enhancements:

  • Faster runtime of data/multi action with parameters
  • Faster runtime of data actions with multiple steps
  • Remove duplicated job creation for multi-actions step

Faster Runtime of Data/Multi-Actions with Parameters

With this enhancement, we reduce some of performance overhead when adding data action parameters to resolve the filter value(s).  Specifically, we reduce the performance overhead of data/multi-action execution when binding to:

  • story or input control filters to data/multi-action parameters and
  • story API script providing the context of the data/multi-action parameters.

Technical enhancements were delivered to transform filter IDs into short IDs more efficiently as this process was time consuming and often observable during the execution preparation time.  From a customer perspective, there is no additional work required to take advantage of this performance enhancement.

Faster Runtime with Data Actions with Multiple Steps

With this enhancement, we are reducing the overall execution time where the data action contains multiple steps that execute relatively quickly.  Data actions use asynchronous scheduling of follow-up jobs as part of the preparation step to create subsequent tasks for data action steps.  Follow-up tasks are now dynamically generated only when the remaining job timeout is insufficient, which allows the next step to be executed within the current job without creating a new one. This process adapts iteratively, as jobs nearing timeouts will spawn another task to delegate the remaining work, ensuring a more optimal job execution.  From a customer perspective, there is no additional work required to take advantage of this performance enhancement.

Remove duplicated job creation for Multi Actions step

When executing a multi-action, the system creates a separate job for each step to avoid session timeout issues. For instance, if a multi-action has three data-action steps, it will generate three jobs, each handling a data-action step upon invocation. This design has been streamlined to remove duplicate jobs as certain steps like data-actions and data import steps inherently create jobs within their own logic.

Multi-actions with many data action steps or data import steps will benefit the most from this enhancement.  From a customer perspective, there is no additional configuration that is required to take advantage of this optimization. 

Conclusion

With the QRC2.2025 release of SAP Analytics Cloud, we introduce significant technical improvements designed to optimize the performance of data/multi-actions, especially when involving parameters and/or multiple steps. These enhancements not only ensure faster runtimes but also simplify the execution process by eliminating unnecessary processing overhead without requiring any additional technical configuration.

This proactive approach by SAP towards continuous performance improvement speaks volumes about our commitment to deliver efficient, robust solutions that align with customer needs and expectations. By providing more transparency about these enhancements, SAP empowers our customers to more effectively leverage these planning related performance optimizations to provide a more enjoyable user experience.

entry.title: Re: Ariba CIG : Split Text
entry.content: Hi Sirui, sorry I didn't get you.Can you please explain what needs to be done..if possible screenshot

entry.title: How to create a report that shows count of GL open items?
entry.content:
I am looking for a way to create a report with ABAP or SQVI, that shows the count of GL open items on GL level.

I don't want to see the lines items and do a manual count outside of SAP. I would need to have this report to run for multiple company codes and the number of transactions are not something to be taken to other applications like excel.

My aim is to have a report with the following fields:

Company CodeGL AccountCountValue

 

Is there a possibility to do this? If so what are the steps I should take to create this as I am not an IT person I would need more details if possible :).

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Error while Creating BP for Customer - "BP role JD10...
entry.content: Check SAP note 2510460 solves your issue

entry.title: Re: Fondo de ahorro MX, devolución del descuento en retro...
entry.content:
Hola Alondra, esto es lo que me comento Hugo Rodriguez,

Lo único que se me ocurre es realizar una regla de cliente que valide que la base del F.Ahorro no sea diferente en un periodo retro al comparar la RT vs la ORT (me parece que es el cc-n /102). Si es así, entonces, restauras la ORT en la RT para que las aportaciones sean las mismas que en las originales. También podrías verificar si los ingresos del periodo actual compensan, o no, las diferencias del periodo retroactivo.

 

Aun no lo pongo en marcha, estaba esperando que algun usuario de la comunidad me pudiera dar alguna otra idra o reforzar el comentario de Hugo

 

Saludos,

   Rogelio

entry.title: why sql trace shows different execution time?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
Why sql trace shows different values 
At st12 at trace analus Gross duration is 467 seconds,when i click to DB-> it show that sql take only 197.
How to understand what were 270 seconds spent on?

entry.title: Query AR
entry.content:
The query below provides information on invoices that are due or due. The condition searches the PPS table (created by us) for the partner's branch and business, but we cannot apply this type of condition when the entry comes from a manual accounting entry or an entry on account in the accounts receivable module.

I would like to include in the query the condition that when U_Fast_CodPPS is not found, it will bring the information on the branch code registered in the document that was entered.

I would also like to know if you can suggest another way to bring the U_Fast_CodPPS information when the document information is not provided by an invoice?

 

WITH Depo AS (
    SELECT 
        "DocEntry", 
        MAX("WhsCode") AS "WhsCode" -- Select nas Linhas da OINV
    FROM 
        "INV1"
    GROUP BY 
        "DocEntry"
),
 
Dipo AS (
    SELECT 
        "DocEntry", 
        MAX("WhsCode") AS "WhsCode" -- Select nas linhasd da ODPI
    FROM 
        "DPI1"
    GROUP BY 
        "DocEntry"
),
 
Dpoi AS (
    SELECT 
        "DocEntry", 
        MAX("WhsCode") AS "WhsCode" -- Select nas linhas da ORIN
    FROM 
        "RIN1"
    GROUP BY 
        "DocEntry"
)
 
SELECT 
 
CASE 
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 13 THEN T8."U_Fast_CodPPS"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 14 THEN X0."U_Fast_CodPPS"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 203 THEN T9."U_Fast_CodPPS"
    END AS "Customer",
    T0."TransId" AS "Launch",
    CASE 
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 13 THEN T3."Serial"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 14 THEN T5."Serial"
    END AS "Invoice",
    T2."CardCode" AS "Customer SAP",
    T2."CardName" AS "Customer Name",
    CASE 
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 13 THEN T3."DocTotal"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 14 THEN T5."DocTotal"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 203 THEN T4."DocTotal"
    END AS "Original Amount",
    CASE 
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 13 THEN T3."TaxDate"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 14 THEN T5."TaxDate"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 203 THEN T4."TaxDate"
    END AS "Doc Date",
    T1."DueDate" AS "Due Date",
    T1."Debit" - T1."Credit" AS "Invoice Value",
    T1."BalDueDeb" - T1."BalDueCred" AS "Open Balance",
    DAYS_BETWEEN(T1."DueDate", CURRENT_DATE) AS "Past Due Days"
    
 
FROM 
    "OJDT" T0
INNER JOIN 
    "JDT1" T1 ON T0."TransId" = T1."TransId" 
INNER JOIN 
    "OCRD" T2 ON T1."ShortName" = T2."CardCode"
LEFT JOIN 
    "OINV" T3 ON T0."CreatedBy" = T3."DocEntry"
LEFT JOIN 
    "ODPI" T4 ON T0."CreatedBy" = T4."DocEntry"
LEFT JOIN 
    "ORIN" T5 ON T0."CreatedBy" = T5."DocEntry"
    
    
LEFT JOIN 
    Depo ON T3."DocEntry" = Depo."DocEntry"    
LEFT JOIN 
    Dipo ON T4."DocEntry" = Dipo."DocEntry"  
LEFT JOIN 
    Dpoi ON T5."DocEntry" = Dpoi."DocEntry"  
    
    
    
LEFT JOIN 
    "@FAST_PPSF" T7 ON T1."ShortName" = T7."U_Fast_PN"
LEFT JOIN 
    "@FAST_PSF1" T8 ON T7."DocEntry" = T8."DocEntry" AND Depo."WhsCode" = T8."U_Fast_Filial"
LEFT JOIN 
    "@FAST_PSF1" T9 ON T7."DocEntry" = T9."DocEntry" AND Dipo."WhsCode" = T9."U_Fast_Filial"
LEFT JOIN 
    "@FAST_PSF1" X0 ON T7."DocEntry" = X0."DocEntry" AND Dpoi."WhsCode" = X0."U_Fast_Filial"
    
    
 
WHERE 
    ((T1."BalDueDeb" - T1."BalDueCred") <> 0) 
    AND T2."CardType" = 'C'
    --AND T0."TransId" IN (3950, 2651, 1180)

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Architecture as a Leadership Factor
entry.content:
Congratulations on this insightful article! The discussion on enterprise architecture as a leadership factor was both thought-provoking and highly relevant. Your breakdown of how EA bridges business strategy and technology execution was particularly compelling.

I would love to dive deeper into the presentation you delivered at DSAG Technology Days—would it be possible to access the presentation deck? It would be incredibly valuable for further understanding and application.

Looking forward to more of your contributions!

Bests

Kannan

entry.title: Expose the custom field in SAP C4C V2
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have added a custom field at the item level in the Quote in SAP C4C V2, and we want to replicate this field to an external S/4HANA system.

Could you please guide us on how to expose this custom field in an API or OData service in V2 so it can be consumed by the external system?

Thank you so much in advance!

entry.title: Re: TM Freight Estimate API
entry.content: There may not be any standard API calls available for Freight Estimator. we will have to build a customized API with the simulation of Freight Cost

entry.title: SAP Test Automation by Tricentis (STA) license Cost
entry.content:
Requirements and a cost estimate for the SAP Test Automation by Tricentis (STA) license for SAP Cloud ALM.  Could you please provide us with the relevant next steps required?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Test Automation by Tricentis (STA) license Cost
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

To answer your query, kindly check the below document :

  • 3499485 - How much does SAP Cloud ALM cost?

    >> More information on SAP Cloud ALM (and Tricentis Test Automation tool usage) charges and fair usage can be found in the SAP Cloud ALM Questions and Answers document (page 17 onward, section "Cost & Value", page 38 for Tricentis).

    >> SAP Cloud ALM options for which you may get charged are documented in our Fair Use statement. 

  • 3444248 - SAP Cloud ALM Set Up Tricentis Automation Help

    >> Here is the link to the SAP Cloud ALM application Help for this topic : 

    Set Up Tricentis Automation

Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: PDF Payload logging in SAP CPI
entry.content: Hello @Ryan-Crosby, the payload logged is not in .pdf format but in .txt format. I require the payload to be logged in .pdf format.

entry.title: Problem in a Flow between the GeneralSplitter appliance and the Aggregator
entry.content:
Hello dears,
I have a problem in a Flow between the GeneralSplitter appliance and the Aggregator,
there are two messages:

1.- In the Aggregator
GeneralSplitter may not pass XML message to Aggregator,Aggregator supports XML only

2.-At Flow Level
The Process requiere a transaction because aggregator is used. Set transacction handling to Requiered for JDBC


The message you are sending between the GeneralSplitter and the Aggregator are these three XML


<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Inventory>
<Car>
<Id>1</Id>
<Brand>Renault</Brand>
<Model>Captur</Model>
<Year>2021</Year>
<Color>Azul</Color>
</Car>
</Inventory>

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Inventory>
<Car>
<Id>8</Id>
<Brand>Renault</Brand>
<Model>Prado</Model>
<Year>2021</Year>
<Color>Negro</Color>
</Car>
</Inventory>


<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Inventory>
<Car>
<Id>3</Id>
<Brand>Renault</Brand>
<Model>Prado</Model>
<Year>2021</Year>
<Color>Azul</Color>
</Car>
</Inventory>


Any help, thank you very much in advance Manos.
Regards,
Roberto Bahamondes Flores

entry.title: Flexible Workflow: Notify All Previous Approvers on PR Rejection
entry.content:
Hi!

I have a flexible workflow set up for purchase requisition approval, and I need to ensure that when a requisition is rejected, not only the initiator but also all previous approvers receive an email notification. Has anyone dealt with a similar requirement?

entry.title: Re: Error while Creating BP for Customer - "BP role JD10...
entry.content:
HI @vaghelachirag 

I can see you have created BP role JD10 but  you are selecting BP role JD10 X while creating BP 

Please check and select correct BP role which you created. 

Also check in Define BP roles configuration if you have selected Hide check box. It should not be Hide.

 

As mentioned check again and confirm.

Regards

Vijaykumar

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards
AK

entry.title: Re: How to set up multiple cost centres split for an empl...
entry.content:
Hello @AliD1 

 

Maybe you talked about Alternative Cost Distribution?

You can see this KBA to see how you can configure it: 2318772 - Employee Central - Alternative Cost Distribution

Then, you can see arcticle to know how this works with Finance SAP: Configuring the replication of Cost Centers from S... - SAP Community

About ECP, I think that is the same behavior like EC because Cost Centers is an entity managed by FI, not on EC, so in those cases the EC/ECP only receive the informations.

From EC to ECP flow you can see this arcticle too: SAP SuccessFactors EC-ECP Employee Data Replicatio... - SAP Community

I can't give you more details because I never implemented this scenery, but I already works on projects with this type of conection and know that this is possible by Alternative Cost Distribution tool, and we can request help to another specialist here.

I hope that this could help you!

 

Best Regards,

JC

entry.title: Re: No Currency Pair is defined for currencies
entry.content: Hi Edna. J78 is activated and I have every role available in the system. Yet Define Leading Currency is not visible to me in CBC. Why is that?

entry.title: Re: PDF Payload logging in SAP CPI
entry.content:
1. You have snagged the body as text in your script
  2. The job of a logger is not for display if you expect it to render a PDF

entry.title: Role Collection Assignment to SAP BTP Platform User via Groups in SAP Cloud Identity is not working
entry.content:
Role Collection Assignment to SAP BTP Platform User via Groups in SAP Cloud Identity Service is not working.

 

1). Create Trust between SAP Cloud Identity Service and Global Account in SAP BTP.

2) Create Users in SAP Cloud Identity Service Admin Console.

3) Created user in SAP BTP Global account with email identifier same as point-2.Assign Role in BTP Platform.

3) User is able to log in to SAP BTP Platform Global Account.

>>>>>>>>>>>>> IDENTITY AUTHENTICATION IS WORKING<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<

 

1) CREATED GROUP IN SAP Cloud Identity Service Admin Console with group type AUTHORISATION and enabled Central Store-Based Provisioning in Application Setting for SAP BTP Application.

2) Mapped above created group to role collection in Global Account in SAP BTP Platform.

3) Assigned user group to user in SAP Cloud Identity Service Admin Console.

 

Logged in Logged out multiple times, in different browser but role assigned via group is not effective.

entry.title: Error Create Basic FreeStyle VSCode
entry.content:
Hi!

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to get the EventHandler function from a UI5 control
entry.content:
Thanks, mysterious author.

I wanted to debounce a liveChange event from the Fiori Elements default filter without changing the function itself.

Through the Event Registry, I managed to detach, add the debounce, and re-attach the event.

entry.title: Re: No Currency Pair is defined for currencies
entry.content:
Hola Gabor5

Scope item 1X1 (Foreign Currency Risk Management) needs to be activated for SSCUI 101026 to be available. This scope item requires an additional SAP S/4HANA Cloud license. 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3452651

 

Best regards

Edna

entry.title: How to Enable Document Type/Numbering configuration in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
We are unable to configure/create new document types in SAP S/4HANA Cloud? 
How is numbering configured within Sales Documents?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Document Type/Numbering configuration i...
entry.content:
For numbering configuration please refer to Flexible Sales Document Numbering

For the creation of new sales order types, see below:

  • Currently, on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, it's not possible to create new sales order types or copy existing ones.
  • However, a feature request was already created and accepted for this business requirement.
  • At the moment, Customers can subscribe to the Early Adopter Program and test this functionality before it's released. Check more information here: SAP Early Adopter Care: SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Create Custom Sales Order Type by Copying Standard Sales Order Type Templates

entry.title: Re: Assistance Required: Restricting Receipt Stock Usage...
entry.content:
Hi,

There are 2 options you can use:

  • Create a virtual warehouse >>> receive finished goods (FG) to the virtual warehouse >>> close production order >>> transfer from virtual warehouse to specific warehouse that sales user can use
  • if FG is managed by batch, you can use "locked" batch status to prevent user from using it. Whenever production order is closed, update "locked" status to "released" status.

Hope this helps,

SonTran

entry.title: Logout functionality SAP CAP application deployed in Cloud Foundry using Managed approuter
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have built a SAP CAP application with UI5 and used managed approuter. The application is deployed in Cloud Foundry and I can access it through HTML5 applications. This application uses XSUAA authentication. 

I want to implement logout functionality in this application for the user. I have read many blogs and I'm unable to implement it. I have done things like making changes in xs-app.json file to include the logout parameter as described in the link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/logout

On the logout button in my app, i put the controller logic to 

window.location.replace("/my/logout").

After this when I click on logout, it takes me to a URL:
"https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/resources/sap-ui-logout-url" and when i click the back button, it again goes directly into the application logged in as the previous user, which means that it is not deleting the session maybe.

I even followed the question:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/logout-sap-ui5-app-cloud-foundry-sample-code/qaq-p/12248689

(Yes, I gave relative path in the controller script like my/logout as I am using managed approuter)

But when i do this, i get an internal server error after clicking on logout.

On checking the error logs of the app, I see the error as:
GET request to /74cf1c07-1827-49d2-9bc9-90ba4d9f6781.capleavemanagementappservice.leavemanagement-1.0.0/my/logout completed with status 500 request method (GET) does not match logout configuration logoutMethod (POST)


Does anybody know how can I implement a logout functionality in my application?

Thanks,
Raihan

entry.title: Re: About 1-5 times per week our HA SQLA 17 database will begin pausing
entry.content:
"You mention huge updates/deletes for many thousands of rows. Do you use intermediate commits during those bulk operations to decrease the transaction size?"

We are starting with a single DELETE statement, which is logged as multiple individual statements by the database engine. So, in those cases, only if SQL Anywhere does it, and we doubt it does.

Example:

DELETE FROM BigFile WHERE DateInserted = Current Date -1

-- might delete 100k records, which turns into 100k individual "DELETE FROM BigFile WHERE ID=nnnnn" in the transaction log.

-- Would we gain anything by:

DELETE FROM BigFile WHERE DateInserted = Current Date -1 AND SomeValue='Y';

While discussing this internally, this was said: "Ideally the DELETE/UDATE statement could take a TOP 1000 or something and just loop until nothing was left" -- so this might be a solution/help.

entry.title: Re: Access to competency object via manage data
entry.content: Hi there, Could you solve this issue? I have the very same problem right now.

entry.title: offcycle event batch not working
entry.content:
Hi Team ,

We have created an offcycle event batch with the associated scenario as "Trigger an Off Cycle Event Batch" with the below condition

If the event reason = Contract extended
and
Event date = Today
Then
Set Custom Field = Add ()
First = Custom Field
Second = 1

I have also created off cycle event group where i have added my test user

When i run the off cycle event batch job , the job is successful however the record is not getting picked up and data is not get getting populated in the custom field.

When i checked the traces of the rule there is no data picked up in the trace , looks like my rule is not getting picked up by offcycle event batch . Can you please let me know what can be the cause of this issue .

Please note i have added and event reason contract extended for today in the user profile.

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning Hub Adoption Sessions - New webinars starting 29 May 2025
entry.content:
Hi @arymak87 

You are most welcome.

You can subscribe to this specific blog post by clicking the "Subscribe" button at the top of this page:

entry.title: Re: Projected stock with IBP_CAGGR (current and future pe...
entry.content:
Hi Andrei,

Unfortunately, it doesn’t work in the case of projected stock.
If I have TWK as the base planning level for the input key figure to be aggregated, and for each TWK within a month I have a value of 20 for this key figure, then the projected stock at the end of the month will still be 20 — not 80 (which I would get if I simply did a SUM).

entry.title: Hi there, I want revoke very same question. Has anyone has solution?
entry.content:
Users have same admin access in our SF instance. While the one of them able to save changes to the object "Competancy" or create this object via manage data. Other one cannot make changes if it tries, warning appeared "You don’t have permissions to make changes to competencies. Please contact your administrator.".

 

Talent Management, #Competency, #ManageDataPermissions

entry.title: How to copy KF Sales Output to KF Sales Input with conditions in Data Action
entry.content:
Hi

I am looking copy from KF Sales Output to KF Sales Input with conditions (Sales Previous > 0 and Sales Forecast = NULL ) but data action script is not working and not providing any good trace to fix.

The KF’s will contains data at different aggregations level.

KF’s Sales Previous, Sales Forecast are at MatLine Level. Sales Input, Sales output are at MatLine, MatGroup level.

From above Sales Output values should copy to Sales Input at values (overwrite red colour values with green colour values) where condition met (Sales Previous > 0 and Sales Forecast = NULL)

CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = ON
MEMBERSET [d/CompCode] = (%CCODE_Input%)
MEMBERSET [d/SalesGroup] = (%SGroup_Input%)
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %FYMonth_Input%
INTEGER @Ivalue
 
FOREACH [d/MatLine]
@Ivalue = 0
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Sales_Previous", [d/CompCode] = %CCODE_Input%, [d/SalesGroup] = %SGroup_Input%%, [d/Date] = %FYMonth_Input%, [d/MatGroup] = "#", [d/Version] = "public.Actual") > 0 THEN
     IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Sales_Forecast", [d/CompCode] = %CCODE_Input%, [d/SalesGroup] = %SGroup_Input%%, [d/Date] = %FYMonth_Input%, [d/MatGroup] = "#", [d/Version] = "public.Actual") = NULL THEN
         @Ivalue = 1
    ENDIF
ENDIF
  IF @Ivalue = 1 THEN
    DATA([d/Measures] = "Sales_Input", [d/CompCode] = %CCODE_Input%, [d/SalesGroup] = %SGroup_Input%%, [d/Date] = %FYMonth_Input%) =
    RESULTLOOKUP([d/CompCode] = %CCODE_Input%, [d/SalesGroup] = %SGroup_Input%%, [d/Date] = %FYMonth_Input%, , [d/Measures] = "Sales_Output")
  ENDIF
ENDFOR

 

Please help.

Regards, Vasu

entry.title: How can I sum two different tables in SAC Story
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Can you please help me how I can sum two different tables in SAC story

Here I need to sum two accounts in table 1 and 4 accounts in table 2 together.

Can someone please help?

entry.title: Re: Logout-SAP UI5 app - cloud foundry - sample code
entry.content:
Hi @marisobert, I tried implementing this but I am getting internal server error when I click on logout.
On checking the error logs of the app, I see the error as:
GET request to /74cf1c07-1827-49d2-9bc9-90ba4d9f6781.capleavemanagementappservice.leavemanagement-1.0.0/my/logout completed with status 500 request method (GET) does not match logout configuration logoutMethod (POST)

I am using managed approuter, SAP Build Work Zone standard edition.

entry.title: How to populate validTo in IAS from SuccessFactors via IPS
entry.content:
Hi there,

We use SuccessFactors with IAS/IPS.  We have two transformation scripts in IPS with our mappings for Source And Target systems.  Up til now this has been fine and we've added in numerous fields, but I need to add in CompanyExitDate from Successfactors into IAS field validTo. It's a standard User field, so I thought this would be straightforward  - mistake...

In Source Transformation I have: 

{
"sourcePath": "$.companyExitDate",
"optional": true,
"targetPath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User']['validTo']"
},

and in Target transformation I have 

{
"sourcePath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User']['validTo']",
"optional": true,
"targetPath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User']['validTo']"
},

But nothing populates for people with a CompanyExitDate. 

Any ideas what I'm doing wrong?

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Attach technician photo in an email to customer informing them about technician arrival
entry.content:
Hi Folks, 

I am trying to create a Business rule which will send en email to customer informing them about technician's arrival. 

but i want to attach technician's photo in the email as well . Is this possible and how ?

 

Regards

Priyanka

entry.title: Re: RECN entries in SVT confirmed table
entry.content:
Hello

one hint of "warning"

Many companies are doing "archiving" of logistic documents to save memory. The strategy to do so is different.

RREGCH_EVALUATE_QUANTITIES

Can be used if the "logistic" documents are not archived and as you have explained only for one material

The SAP standard does work from "CBRC20" hit list and as mentioned only support 90 days.

So if you need a longer period (in most of the cases the answer is "yes") you need to look fo ther options

Now we come to the crucial topic: WHAT IS TO BE SUPPORTED Exactly?

And based on that: you will easily find a customer solution. And on top: what is the "performance" to support?

What i can share: many companies use a trend of "extracting" the data to "combine" the outside of SAP. Some are trying to use e.g. SAP BW.

The SAP original solution is clearly not a bad option. If you can "modify" the 90 day rule without modification.. not sure

To go for a customer solution is as well possible.

I wish you the best

C.B.

PS: if you analyse RREGCH_EVALUATE_QUANTITIES you might get ideas regarding a potential customer solution. Currently this ABAP report can only be used for a "single" case and not by "mass"

entry.title: Re: Can OpenSSL in Crystal Reports 2025 be an install opt...
entry.content:
Hi Gerald,

The Development team looked into this and as noted ssl is integrated into multiple area's of the product and 3rd party dependencies so there is no option to make it a separate install option.

Product owner is discussing the upgrade over then future update plans, it's going to take time to do but they are seriously planning this upgrade, specifically for customers like yours.

Here's a comment about your/their concerns from the Product owner:

"Discussed offline, all known openssl 1.0.2 CVEs were analyzed, none of them are real issues for Crystal Reports workflows. So customers don’t have to worry."

Please let them know they won't have any issues as noted above using the current version and Product will be implementing 3.0.7 or later in future updates... it's going to take time due to SSL integration into a large part of CR/BOE products.

Hope that helps?

Don

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes
entry.content: FYI - SP 38 will be released sometime this week, look for availability in the usual SAP download sites...

entry.title: Assignment of objects to contract
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We need multiple object assignment to perform the valuation like Funiture and machinery Equipment and computers i already used IM, IG.IB, COB- Furniture And IE - Equipment, now we need to vehicle and computer hardware Object assignments System is not allowing to use the same J4 -COB or IE for Vehicle and computer hardware, asset class are different each of object. How to create the object type vehicle and computer hardware. or else how to use the J4(COB) for different asset class for valuation. 

Best Regards,

Sridhar

entry.title: Re: Surfing the GOSI Update: From Concept to Delivered Solution
entry.content:
Hi hanyzanaty,

Thank you for a detailed document. It was really helpful to understand better on what new features are being brought by SAP. 

We're currently implementing and testing the solution. With the recent changes announced (Note#3605632 & 3598324) we've manually implemented these notes as these changes are part of E6 HRSP pack and scheduled for mid June release.

Could you please review and advise on the below:

1. We could not see the Pop message while maintaining IT3252 record in ECP (Note#3598324) for employees < 50yrs of age. We're using Web GUI instead of SAP GUI.
2. What will be the impact when merit increase happens and will it affects the contributions? Our understanding is the salary at the begin the year will be considered for GOSI calculations through the year despite any salary changes during the year.
3.When employee crossed years of service milestone in mid of the month / mid of the year, how the calculations will be affected.
4. One employee hits 11% of contribution, will that be constant through out until employee reaches the threshold / retirement age? assuming that there are no further legal changes
5. Assumption: System is going to prorate for New Hire / Termination / Rehire irrespective of the SI grouping
6. No age check is for employees who would like to continue to contribute after the retirement age reached?
7. How Retroactive Termination and Company code transfers work?
8. Note#3598324 suggest mass updates to the existing employees in Global Info portlet based on the SU / SN group. Are these records effective 01.07.2024?

Thanks

Madhav

Where you trying to change this field? Is on HRIS entity or in an MDF object?

JC

entry.title: Re: How to Display an Image on the Selection Screen in SAP ABAP
entry.content: Good job, it worked with me, but there is a little problem is the picture appear in all pages not only in the selection screen

entry.title: Useful links to align SAP SuccessFactors with the EU Pay Transparency Directive
entry.content:
Introduction

 

This blog provides links to the EU Pay Transparency Directive (2026) and how to align with it in SAP SuccessFactors. 

 

Links

 

  • A great blog by Phil MacGovern from Effective People that summarizes the different areas/modules that can be impacted as well as links to the official EU website describing the changes.

 

  • All the out of the box Stories available through Content Store.

 

  • Step by step demo recordings by @CSmith on how to build Compensation module stories:
    • Learn How to Create A Compensation Budget Dashboard in Report Stories
    • Learn How to Create an Incentive Outcome Dashboard in Report Stories

 

 

 

If you hear of specific features in one of the next SAP SuccessFactors releases that are specifically addressing this Directive, please let us know in the comments !

 

 

All the best,

Xavier

 

(if you found this blog useful please consider giving it a like)

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Security & Data Access Controls Overview
entry.content:
Dear @Kishore50 

Roles in Datasphere cannot be transported, unlike in SAP Analytics Cloud. I have another blog that includes a list of what can be exported. Currently, I don't see any plans to support this feature, but it's a great idea. Please consider submitting your suggestion on the SAP Influence portal.

 

Best regards,  

Matthew

All the best, Matthew

entry.title: Re: LangChain vs LlamaIndex: Enhancing LLM Applications on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hello,

Good article. I get refered to this article from official SAP learning site, so it means you did good job!

entry.title: Re: Sales BOM explosion with component of item category SERV
entry.content: Dear Colleague, I hope you find yourself well! Thank you for joining the community. As soon as possible, a technical expert will contact you to clarify your question. I am adjusting the tags to redirect the issue to the right team. Best Regards, Erick Goulardt SAP Support

entry.title: How to deactivate notification for SAP GUI Scripting?
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to know how to disable notification for SAP GUI, specifically via registry key.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to deactivate notification for SAP GUI Scripting?
entry.content:
Hello,

It is possible to disable via the SAP GUI options, on the "Scripting" section.

And the correspondent registry values are:

For the "Notify when a script attaches to SAP GUI" option: 

[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\SAP\SAPGUI Front\SAP Frontend Server\Security] WarnOnAttach (REG_DWORD) [Default: 1] {0 = inactive; 1 = active}

For the "Notify when a script opens a connection" option:

[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\SAP\SAPGUI Front\SAP Frontend Server\Security] WarnOnConnection (REG_DWORD) [Default: 1] {0 = inactive; 1 = active}

entry.title: SuccessFactors Learning - Outlook Integration to book a room when a class is scheduled
entry.content:
I know there is no direct integration currently but I wanted to know if there are any proposed workarounds or if you know of any middleware or Power Automate workarounds to book a room in Outlook when a class is scheduled in SuccessFactors Learning.

Has anyone come up with a novel solution to this situation?

entry.content:
Also what Ido mentioned and you must use the 64 bit installer for VS 2022 and above, 32 bit installer will not work for VS 2022...

CR for Visual Studio SP38 64b installer (VS 2022 and above)

entry.title: Integrating with Snowflake Using SAP Cloud Integration: A Deep Dive into the Snowflake Adapter
entry.content:
In today’s data-driven business world, cloud data platforms have become the backbone of scalable and real-time analytics. One such powerhouse is Snowflake — a cloud-native data warehouse designed for performance, concurrency, and simplicity.

What is Snowflake in a Nutshell?

Snowflake is a cloud-based data platform that allows organizations to store and analyze vast amounts of structured and semi-structured data. 

Snowflake Adapter in SAP CI

As part of SAP’s Integration Suite, SAP Cloud Integration (CI) offers connectivity to various third-party systems, and with the Snowflake adapter, it becomes possible to directly interact with your Snowflake data warehouse — automating business processes that rely on real-time or batch data movement.

Snowflake Adapter is your one-stop data management tool to interact and execute operations on Snowflake.

  • Bulk Export and Import: Facilitates importing from a range of input formats like CSV, JSON, Avro, etc. Similarly, you can export data to your desired format using the unload capability.
  • Snowflake Operations Support: Offers support for all Snowflake operations along with SQL support for advanced users.
  • Ease of Access and Connectivity: Enables saving of connection-related details on our platform to allow simplified operations and querying.
  • Multiple options for Staging Storage: Various options to load data into staging storage like Amazon S3, Google Cloud Storage, or Microsoft Azure.
  • Dynamic configuration with headers and properties: Assigning dynamic values to different properties allows enhanced flexibility to your integration flows. You can also refer to dynamic parameters using SAP Cloud Integration exchange headers and properties.

In this blog post, We will take a deep dive into the following operations mentioned below:

  • Insert – Load new data into Snowflake tables.

  • Select – Query data for reporting or downstream integration.

  • Delete – Remove specific records as part of data cleansing or archiving.

  • Execute – Run SQL statements

  • Tablelist – Retrieve metadata and structure information of Snowflake tables.

  • Update – Modify existing records based on dynamic business rules.

 

Snowflake:

Lets get started with the configurations that are needed to create Database and the Table on Snowflake:

1. Log on to your Snowflake account and in left panel select Data --> Databases.

Please note: You need to System Admin role to create Tables in Snowflake

2. In the Database section, click on + Database button on the top right and create a database with a desired name, I created a Database with name "TESTING"

3. Once the Database is created, you will see two schemas "INFORMATION_SCHEMA" and "PUBLIC", select any schema under which you intend to create the Table. I selected "PUBLIC" schema to create the Table

I am using Standard option to create the Table.

4. At this step you need to define the schema of your table and click on "Create Table"

The Table name that I created is "ACCOUNT", and it looks below :

We are good on Snowflake side, Lets dive into our SAP CI Tenant and check on the Snowflake Adapter.

SAP Cloud Integration Tenant:

In this blog, I will performing operations like Insert, Delete, Update, Table List, Execute and Select. I have created a simple iflow where I will be sending the data from Postman and perform the Operations on Snowflake using Snowflake Receiver Adapter.

Snowflake Receiver Adapter:

The connection tab contains the following fields:

Field

Description

Authentication

Select the Database Account method as the authentication mechanism.

Credential Name Alias

Specify the artifact Name that stores the username/password credentials in the Security Material.

Address

Specify the JDBC endpoint URL of the Snowflake application to be used for the connection. This address typically contains an account identifier which is a combination of the organization and account name separated by a hyphen(orgname-account_name).

Database

Specify the name of the database. "TESTING" in our case

Schema

Specify the name of the schema to be accessed. "Public" in our case

Warehouse

Specify the name of the Snowflake warehouse. If the warehouse provided is not found/incorrect, it uses DEFAULT.

1. Operation - Insert

Insert Operation is used to insert a record into the Table, Lets populated the Table "ACCOUNT" with some records.

Request Payload: It is mandatory to include metadata of the structure with datatype attribute for fieldname in the INSERT payload. The metadata/row tags are case sensitive and must be in lower case.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ROOT>
	<metadata>
		<fieldname datatype="VARCHAR">ID</fieldname>
		<fieldname datatype="VARCHAR">LASTNAME</fieldname>
		<fieldname datatype="VARCHAR">FIRSTNAME</fieldname>
		<fieldname datatype="VARCHAR">SALUTATION</fieldname>
		<fieldname datatype="VARCHAR">FULLNAME</fieldname>
	</metadata>
	<row>
		<ID>00QJ1000004yZSiMAM</ID>
		<LASTNAME>Oswal</LASTNAME>
		<FIRSTNAME>Punith</FIRSTNAME>
		<SALUTATION>Mr.</SALUTATION>
		<FULLNAME>Punith Oswal</FULLNAME>
	</row>
</ROOT>

Request sent from Postman:

Message Successful in SAP CI:

Record inserted in Snowflake:

2. Operation - Update :

Used to Update an existing record in the Table.

Lets update the existing record that we created in the Insert Operation and Change Firstname from Punith to Rohit and Fullname to Rohit Oswal

Payload for Update: "where" field is mandatory in the payload, it acts as a where clause for the record to get updated.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ROOT>
	<metadata>
		<fieldname datatype="VARCHAR">ID</fieldname>
		<fieldname datatype="VARCHAR">LASTNAME</fieldname>
		<fieldname datatype="VARCHAR">FIRSTNAME</fieldname>
		<fieldname datatype="VARCHAR">SALUTATION</fieldname>
		<fieldname datatype="VARCHAR">FULLNAME</fieldname>
	</metadata>
	<row>
		<ID>00QJ1000004yZSiMAM</ID>
		<LASTNAME>Oswal</LASTNAME>
		<FIRSTNAME>Rohit</FIRSTNAME>
		<SALUTATION>Mr.</SALUTATION>
		<FULLNAME>Rohit Oswal</FULLNAME>
		<where>ID='00QJ1000004yZSiMAM'</where>
	</row>
</ROOT>

Request sent from Postman:

Message successful in SAP CI

Record Updated in Snowflake:

3. Operation - Delete :

Used to Delete an existing record in the Table.

Currently there are 2 records in the "Account Table", lets delete record with Firstname "Rohit".

There is no request payload needed for DELETE operation, Just trigger a blank request from the Postman.

Message successful in SAP CI:

 

 

 

 

Record with FIRSTNAME = Rohit deleted in Snowflake Table:

4. Operation - Table List :

This operation lists the tables for the current specified schema.

This operation lists the all details of the Tables present under the schema, Schema = PUBLIC in our case.

There is no request payload needed for Table List operation, Just trigger a blank request from the Postman.

Message successful in SAP CI:

Response from Snowflake:

5. Operation - SELECT : 

Select is used to fetch data from the table. You can customize data by selecting required columns in Response Fields for a specific condition using Where Clause. You can use Limit to fetch a
limited number of records from a predefined Offset value and finally, Orderby Statement allows
you to return records in descending or ascending order.

Currently there are 2 records in the "Account Table", lets fetch the Record ID = 

12QJ1000004yZSiPPP with response fields - ID,FULLNAME

There is no request payload needed for SELECT operation, Just trigger a blank request from the Postman.

Message Successful in SAP CI:

Response from Snowflake:

6. Operation - EXECUTE : 

Execute allows you to run SQL queries or stored procedures on the target table.

Lets delete our entire table using EXECUTE operation, using SQL statement - DROP TABLE ACCOUNT

There is no request payload needed for EXECUTE operation, Just trigger a blank request from the Postman.

Message successful in SAP CI:

Response from Snowflake:

Table "ACCOUNT" deleted in Snowflake account.

Conclusion:

In this blog, we explored key Snowflake adapter operations in SAP CI — from Insert and Update to Select and Execute — laying the groundwork for seamless data integration. These core actions empower you to connect SAP with Snowflake efficiently for real-time and batch scenarios.

In the next blog, I’ll cover advanced operations like Bulk Upsert and UNLOAD — stay tuned!

 

Hope this helps!

Cheers,

Punith Oswal

entry.title: Re: How to create a report that shows count of GL open it...
entry.content:
Hi @Babak2 

You can create a simple ABAP report by using below tables -

1) BSIS for GL open items

2) BSIK for Vendor Open items

3) BSID for Customer open items

Other manual way is to use the same tables with SE16. You can use number of entries tab in SE16 selection screen to check number of entries. You can create layout and SAVE for faster processing

Check and let me know. If this answers your query, please confirm and close the post.

 

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Re: crpe32.dll | System.Type.Initialization.Exception
entry.content:
First thing is SP 38 was just released today so download it and upgrade your Project to use it and rebuild.

See this blog on upgrading:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/upgrading-a-visual-studio-2008-gt-2022-net-project-with-the-latest-cr-net/ba-p/13469215

What version of Visual studio are you using?

WEB or Desktop app?

Project platform set to X64 and not AnyCPU?

All CR assemblies have the Copy set to false? You don't want the dll's copied into your \BIN folder.

entry.title: Issue applying Hierarchy on a non key column in Dimension table in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working in SAP Datasphere and need assistance regarding applying a hierarchy on a non-key attribute in a dimension table.

Objective:
I would like to apply a hierarchy on the ECONOMIC ACTIVITY attribute (which contains NACE codes) in the PARTY dimension table.

My Setup:

  • I have a local table named PARTY, where:

    • PARTY_ID is the primary key

    • ECONOMIC ACTIVITY (technical name: ECNMC_ACTVTY) is a regular attribute (not a key)

  • I have created a separate NACE Code Hierarchy table, with semantic usage set as "Dimension with Hierarchy Directory"

    • The hierarchy is defined using standard parent-child relationships

  • I also created a hierarchy directory dimension to represent the NACE code levels, and associated it with the ECONOMIC ACTIVITY field in the PARTY table via a text/association mapping

In the Analytic Model:

  • The Analytic Model is built on top of a FACT table

  • The FACT table is joined to the PARTY table using RELEVANT BUSINESS PARTNER ID → PARTY_ID

  • The join is working as expected, and the RELEVANT BUSINESS PARTNER ID node exposes dimensions from the PARTY table, including ECONOMIC ACTIVITY

  • However, the hierarchy is only available or shown on RELEVANT BUSINESS PARTNER ID, and not on ECONOMIC ACTIVITY

Question:
Why is the hierarchy not appearing for ECONOMIC ACTIVITY in the Analytic Model? Am I missing a step in exposing or enabling the hierarchy on a non-key attribute? Or is it the case that hierarchies in SAP Datasphere are only supported for primary key fields in dimension tables?

Any clarification or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

 

 

Thanks,

Mayura

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content:
@AnnePetteroe 

Thanks for the Information 🙂

Interesting, I am able to check via system -> status for dev system:

but for test system, there is only smaller window and I am unable to display componenets:

do you happen to know an alternative way to check the components in test system?

entry.title: Rates 2.0: Exploring the Latest Enhancements in SAP Fieldglass
entry.content:
Have you heard Rates 2.0 has been released, and that it’s made faster and simpler than ever to create and work with rates? No? 

Allow me to tell you: Rates 2.0 is here, trending, and with exciting updates in the latest release. The enhancements were designed to streamline processes and improve efficiency for users managing statements of work (SOW) and service contracts.

Let's dive into the four key updates: 

  • SOW Worker Role Custom Lookup: The new feature lets you see the value [ALL] for the SOW Worker Role Site Code value key. This means you can now associate site codes in bulk that are valid for a specific SOW worker role and supplier combination, simplifying the management of site structures.
  • External Contract ID as Key for Rates Lookup: For those using the Contracts feature for Services, the 'External Contract ID' field is now available as a lookup key in the Rate and Rate Component custom lookups. This enhancement provides a more efficient way to manage service contracts by leveraging existing contract identifiers.
  • Improved SOW Worker Rate Management: The Effective Date feature now integrates with the Rates 2.0 rate structure, allowing users to determine all relevant rate values for the entire SOW period using the rate Valid On dates. This improvement ensures accurate rate management throughout the duration of a project.
  • Configuration Validation Disabled for Rates 2.0 Companies: Rates 2.0 can now be enabled for new or existing companies without the need for ‘Use Rate Grid for SOW Workers’ company configuration enablement. This change simplifies the setup process, making it easier for companies to adopt the latest rate management features. 

 

For more insights, we invite you to check our document Rates 2.0 Step-by-Step Guide (SAP Customer). It's packed with valuable information like how to create rates from scratch in the new format, what is needed for coexistence with Rates 1.0, and more.
